Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Thunder Fairy]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — The Thunder Fairy is a source of lightning madra scales.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — The Thunder Fairy is Yushi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Thunder Fairy is an older Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Thunder Fairy's spirit was weak following a fight with Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Mercy sent arrows at the Thunder Fairy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yerin devoured power from the Thunder Fairy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Thunder Fairy is a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Thunder Fairy's voice is like snapping lightning and rushing wind.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
